stemHtml: Which of these statements is correct with regards to primary flight controls?

options.a: Fully powered controls provide the pilot with feel feedback from the control surfaces without the need for an artificial feel system.
options.b: Partially powered controls allow the pilot to feel some of the actual aerodynamic loads of the control surface.
options.c: Partially powered systems do not provide any kind of redundancy in case of hydraulic pressure loss.
options.d: In a partially powered system, some of the control surfaces are powered, but not all.
